---
title: "Accepted submissions for Xubuntu's 14.04 default wallpaper set"
---

# Accepted submissions for Xubuntu's 14.04 default wallpaper set

**Please do not edit this page.**

The wallpapers below have been found to conform with the guidelines and are hence accepted **as submissions** for the 14.04 wallpaper contest.

### Pastel
[![Pastel](/archive/roadmaps/specifications/trusty/community-wallpapers/accepted/chenias_pastel_250.jpg)](/archive/roadmaps/specifications/trusty/community-wallpapers/accepted/chenias_pastel.jpg)
  **Author:** Chenias 
  **License:** CC-BY-SA
  **Resolution:** 4272 × 2848
  **[Original Image](http://endorfinium.deviantart.com/art/PASTEL-414621006)**
